_note: Repo-owned promotion policy for the teami.promote_candidate controller (plan ~534-594). Every value is HUMAN-SET: change it by editing this file in a reviewed commit. The controller records policy_version plus the sha256 of this file's exact bytes in every handoff, registry row, and PR marker. Unattended/scanner reads MUST come from the internal clone at default-branch HEAD (resolveTrustedPolicyRead mode 'unattended'); only an explicit user invocation may read the active checkout. The local ledger caches counts for speed but budgets/caps/dedupe truth derives from repo-visible PR markers (CONSTRAINTS #10).

proposal_budget._note: Per-period proposal budget, counted from repo-visible teami_promotion markers on PRs created within period_days. Open PRs whose marker says proposal_state=superseded are excluded from the max_open_proposals count (a human still has to close them, but they no longer represent an active ask).

scanner_routing._note: Scanner routing criteria are repo-owned. Tags and receipts are intent signals only; evidence joins that cannot be resolved deterministically become needs_reconciliation. repo_candidate_artifact_stubs is empty until a reviewed repo-owned stub directory/schema exists.

risk_defaults._note: When the step 9 gate reports defaults_high_risk (prior test-split exposure on the candidate target lineage, or a phoenix-native registered match), the controller labels promotion_risk high_risk unless this flag is explicitly set false (CONSTRAINTS #17: when unsure -> high_risk).
